name: Sync Closed Alarms 26
creator: 9378d367-2470-4d0f-acb4-2303f9927e59
description: This job will synchronize closed LogRhythm alarms and Siemplify alerts. Note: in LogRhythm statuses “Closed”, “Closed False Alarm”, “Closed Resolved”, “Closed Unresolved”, “Closed Reported”, “Closed Monitor” are treated as closed.
